sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game over! The white bar is now all dark now (id=0). The white character is back to the left side. The white bar is gone. The game over. The game seems to have reset. Let me check the current state. The game is over. I need to restart. Let me check the current state.
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
